summary: Phase 8A Voice Foundation RETEST after schema fix. 15/15 tests PASS. All Phase 8A acceptance criteria validated: TwiML fallback Say+Hangup on unknown number; TwiML <Connect><ConversationRelay> with welcomeGreeting + wsAuthToken on configured number; calls row persisted with caller_phone + status='in_progress' + live_status='connecting' + 'started' event logged; /status webhook drives lifecycle correctly (ringing→live_status='ringing', completed→ended + duration + 'ended' event, failed→status='abandoned' + 'error' event); /relay-action returns <Hangup/>; WS endpoint accepts upgrade, rejects invalid token, accepts valid token (one-shot), logs connecting/user_speaking/ai_speaking/interrupted/ended events with correct payloads (dtmf, ws_closed reason); RLS /api/v1/calls correctly returns qa-bot's calls.

minor.issue: Still requires explicit ?company_id= query param even though the JWT carries it. Should default to JWT claim and rely on RLS. Not blocking but inconsistent with multi-tenant pattern. (Noted in iteration_16; carried over.)

action_items: Optional: make GET /api/v1/calls default company_id to JWT claim (non-blocking).
Phase 8E future: replace in-memory wsTokens Map with Redis for multi-worker deploys (already noted in inbound.js, not blocking).
critical_code_review_comments: Schema fix correctly applied: lifecycle.js now inserts only existing columns (caller_phone, status, live_status, language_used, twilio_call_sid, company_id); no direction/caller_number/callee_number references remain.

Fail-fast pattern correctly implemented in /inbound: if getOrCreateCall throws, the handler returns Say+Hangup TwiML instead of going to ConversationRelay with a dangling callId. Verified via test_inbound_unknown_number + DB persistence test.
/status now uses the shared `supabase` client imported from lifecycle.js — dynamic import removed. Confirmed.

CallStatus mapping is correct: ringing→ringing, in-progress/answered→connecting (no longer prematurely 'ai_speaking'), failed/busy/no-answer→status='abandoned' + error event, completed→ended + duration.
logEvent/setLiveStatus/endCall correctly no-op on falsy call_id, preventing FK violations on call_events.
Twilio signature middleware correctly bypassed in dev (TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN='placeholder').
updated_files: /app/voicedesk_project/voicedesk/backend/tests/test_phase8a_voice.py (replaced direction assertion with caller_phone, replaced status=='failed' with status=='abandoned' to match the new mapping)
seed_data_creation: Session-scope autouse fixture twilio_config_seed inserts twilio_configs row (phone_number=+14181112222, company_id=qa-bot) via service-role REST, then deletes it on teardown. Multiple calls + call_events rows are created during tests under qa-bot's company_id; left in place (small footprint, scoped to qa-bot company).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 8A is GREEN. Next phase (8B/8C: ElevenLabs TTS, real LLM, KB integration) can build on top. Migration 005 (system_prompt_voice_fr column on companies) still NOT executed by Karim per E1's note — do not test that field. The 15-test suite is fast (~16s) and idempotent (auto-seeds + auto-cleans twilio_configs). Re-run with: pytest /app/voicedesk_project/voicedesk/backend/tests/test_phase8a_voice.py -v
rca_of_the_issue: Previous iteration_16 RCA (schema mismatch on direction/caller_number/callee_number) is fully resolved. lifecycle.js was refactored to match the real `calls` schema (caller_phone, no direction, no callee_number). inbound.js was hardened with fail-fast on DB insert failure. /status now uses the shared supabase client. CallStatus → live_status/status mapping was corrected. All 8 previously-failing tests now pass alongside the 7 that already passed.
